name: wheelwise
description: A product and engineering decision skill pack for turning ideas into a Chinese report folder with report.md, index.html, assets, visuals, demos, and execution plans.

interface.shortDescription: Generate progressive Chinese reports with visuals, demos, HTML display, and execution plans.
interface.longDescription: WheelWise is a multi-skill product decision pack that structures raw ideas, selects the delivery surface, reviews feasibility and risk, evaluates existing solutions, creates visual briefs and interactive demo specs, and produces one complete Chinese report folder with report.md, index.html, assets, and an execution plan.
defaultPrompt: Use $using-wheelwise to evaluate this product idea.
Use $using-wheelwise to decide what to build, buy, reuse, fork, or reference.
Use $using-wheelwise to create a wheelwise-report folder with report.md, index.html, and assets for this idea.
